part.text:
Created `index.html` as a single self-contained, fully playable Snake game with inline HTML/CSS/JS.

Includes:
- Arrow key controls
- Score + best score display (best saved in `localStorage`)
- Wall/self-collision game over detection
- Restart via `Restart` button or `Space` (also `Enter` toggles start/pause/resume)
- Polished UI with overlay states (Ready/Paused/Game Over)

Open `index.html` in a browser to play.
